_comment: CANONICAL arsenal model registry — the ONE source of truth for per-weapon facts (semantic + routing + UI display). Consumers DERIVE from this; never hand-copy. TWO-LAYER system (stripped to the bones): a Claude BRAIN per member + ONE shared MiniMax DOER. No Critic, no Bench, no reserve models. Readers: summon.py (cloud_tag/role/known-ids), conformity_check.py (role), .claude/hooks/weapon-gate.py (known weapons), .claude/serve.cjs (weight), build.py (role + weaponStatus + emits the full registry into guild-data as GUILD.models for app.js), gen_model_docs.py (docs). role: doer|thinker|both. status: live. weight = serve.cjs usage estimate. UI fields (label/color/tier/host/desc/ollama_desc/call/meter) drive the dashboard arsenal cards; glyph is derived from label in app.js.

seats._comment: Universal role SEATS — TWO LAYERS only. Brain = the thinking mind (wields tools — MUST be a tool-capable Claude model: opus or haiku); Doer = the hands (MiniMax, text only, no tools). A member's `model:` overrides the brain default and is pinned by the thinker gate so it cannot drift. The Doer has NO silent fallback — if MiniMax is unreachable the brain stops and reports rather than guessing on a weaker model. Consumers DERIVE from here; conformity_check ST enforces seat ids exist.

brain.duty: Plans, reviews, owns the standard, wields the tools. Tool-capable Claude only (opus | haiku).

doer.duty: Executes the plan, returns work as text. No tools. No silent fallback — if down, the brain stops and reports.

swarm.comment: Member-instance swarm: each instance runs as the member's brain seat (tool-capable Claude — opus or haiku). The doer (MiniMax) is text-only and cannot hold Edit/Write/Bash tools, so it is never a swarm worker. The session brain decomposes, coordinates, and integrates inline.

opus.summary: Deepest structural reasoning — the Strategist's brain and the master orchestrator.
opus.label: Opus
opus.desc: Claude Opus 4.8 — the master brain. The Butler's voice and the Strategist's mind. Reasons deepest, plans the campaigns.
opus.ollama_desc: Claude Opus 4.8 · Anthropic's most powerful model. Best for complex reasoning, deep analysis, agentic orchestration, and long-horizon planning. The brain for the Butler (the voice) and the Strategist (the planner/router).
opus.call:
Native — no script. The Butler and Strategist ARE Opus. Delegate sub-work via the Task tool: subagent_type + model:'opus'.
(python3 star-alliance-arsenal/summon.py opus just echoes this reminder.)

haiku.summary: Fast, cheap Claude brain — the session mind for every helper but the Strategist.
haiku.label: Haiku
haiku.desc: Claude Haiku 4.5 — the everyday brain. Fast and cheap; plans, reviews, and wields tools, then hands the heavy lifting to MiniMax.
haiku.ollama_desc: Claude Haiku 4.5 · Fastest and cheapest Claude. Plans and wields tools well enough to run a helper's session, and offloads bulk work to the MiniMax doer. The brain for every member except the Strategist.
haiku.call: Native — no script. Task tool subagent, model:'haiku'. Or switch the main loop with /model haiku.

minimax-m3.summary: The one doer. Direct MiniMax cloud sub for all bulk generation/transform.
minimax-m3.label: MiniMax M3
minimax-m3.desc: MiniMax M3 — the hands. Cheap, 1M context, fires every brain's bulk delegated work. The single doer layer; if it is down, the brain stops and reports.
minimax-m3.ollama_desc: MiniMax M3 · 1M context window, very cheap per token. The guild's one and only doer — every Claude brain hands bulk extraction, generation, and transforms to it. Use the DIRECT cloud sub.
minimax-m3.call:
DIRECT cloud sub — NOT Ollama.
Easiest:  python3 star-alliance-arsenal/minimax.py "<prompt>"
  flags: -s <system>  --json  -f <file>  (reads stdin if no arg)
Raw:  POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/text/chatcompletion_v2
  Authorization: Bearer $(cat ~/.config/minimax/m3.key)
  body { model:'MiniMax-M3', messages:[…], max_tokens:16000 }

meter.note: est · set your real plan cap
